app.title: Prisoner's Gambit
app.subtitle: Full-run web prototype with typed decisions and atmospheric table-style UI.

messages.new_run_started: Started new run; previous save overwritten.

summary.label: Summary
summary.help: Summary: floor stakes, pressure leaders, and why this turn matters.

board.label: Board
board.help: Board: live pressure markers, rival status, and civil-war risk.

chronicle.label: Chronicle
chronicle.help: Chronicle: concise timeline of dynasty shifts across floors.

debug.label: Debug
debug.help: Debug: raw state for troubleshooting only; ignore during normal play.

points.current_decision: Act in Current Decision; that is the only required move right now.
points.decision_details: Use Decision Details to confirm what this phase is asking and what your options do.
points.summary_board: Summary explains this floor; Board shows who is gaining pressure.
points.chronicle: Chronicle is your short history of what changed across floors and hosts.
points.choice_cards: On choice cards, read the first line first for immediate effect.

glossary.doctrine: Doctrine reflects your current strategic identity and bias for resolving pressure.
glossary.heir_pressure: Heir Pressure marks branches currently poised to seize succession if momentum continues.
glossary.civil_war_danger: Civil War Danger means current pressure patterns can trigger a costly conflict state. High danger is a signal to reduce instability before it snowballs.
glossary.central_rival: Central Rival is the branch currently best positioned to oppose your line over upcoming floors.
glossary.controlled_vote: Controlled Vote means this floor referendum is being shaped or forced by your active effects and commitments, not a free pick.
glossary.clue_fit: Clue Fit / Memory indicates how strongly this option aligns with recent featured-round reads and floor clue history.
glossary.lineage_direction: Lineage Direction summarizes where your dynasty composition is drifting: hosts, kin support, and outsider pressure.

decision_helpers.generic_phase_choice: Choose the action for the active phase; details explain the tradeoff.
decision_helpers.floor_event_choice: Pick how your house answers the floor event before you commit to the duel and vote plan.
decision_helpers.featured_round: Use clue channels and rival read to decide C, D, or autopilot.
decision_helpers.floor_vote: Vote is shaped by active effects and commitments; confirm before locking floor outcome.
decision_helpers.powerup_choice: Compare Why now, When, Plan, and Cost before you lock in a doctrine piece.
decision_helpers.genome_edit_choice: Compare Rewrite, Shift, Tempo, and Cost before you rewrite the line.
decision_helpers.successor_choice: Compare Pattern, Why now, Watch out, House plan, and clue confidence before choosing the next host.

decision_help.generic: Decision Details explains what this phase is asking. Pick a card to inspect it, then confirm only after the strategic rows line up with your plan.
decision_help.floor_event_choice: Floor event help: each response changes this floor's incentives. Compare duel angle, vote angle, dynasty impact, and offer drift before you lock in the house response.
decision_help.featured_round: Round move help: use the rival read and clue channels to decide whether to cooperate, defect, or trust autopilot for one turn.
decision_help.floor_vote: Floor vote help: your vote may be shaped by active effects. Controlled Vote means your commitments can force the referendum, so confirm the final direction before locking it in.
decision_help.powerup_choice: Powerup help: Why now is the strategic payoff, When is the trigger window, Plan is how to cash it, Cost is the weakness it introduces, and Fit explains whether it deepens, mutates, or distorts your doctrine.
decision_help.genome_edit_choice: Genome edit help: Rewrite shows the direct behavior change, Shift shows the doctrine movement, Tempo shows the pacing effect, and Cost shows what kind of line you give up.
decision_help.successor_choice: Successor help: Pattern is how the heir wins, Why now is the current floor reason to take them, Watch out is the failure mode, Dynasty future is the long-term branch identity, and clue confidence tells you how strongly featured clues support that future.

hints.summary_tab_context: Open Summary tab for full floor context.
hints.summary_tab_choose: Use Summary tab for floor-level context while choosing.

messages.pick_one_offer: Pick one offer in Current Decision.
messages.pick_one_genome: Pick one genome edit in Current Decision.
messages.select_to_preview: Select a card in Current Decision to inspect its strategy rows, then confirm.

fallbacks.pick_highlighted_action: Pick the highlighted action to keep pace.
fallbacks.no_prior_featured_clues: No prior featured clues this floor.
fallbacks.tuning_lineage_behavior: Tuning lineage behavior toward this doctrine.

empty.no_solid_clue_read: No solid clue read this floor.

hints.open_summary_successor_comparison: Open Summary → Successor Comparison for full candidate breakdown.

accessibility.decision_help_title: What does this decision section mean?

generic.label: Continue run
generic.helper: The current phase has a required transition step before the next typed decision.
generic.explanation: The next phase gate is ready. Continue to open the next required step and keep the run moving.

successor_review.label: Review successor options
successor_review.helper: Floor end is complete; review successor candidates to choose the next host.
successor_review.explanation: Next host selection is ready. Open successor options to compare heirs and continue the dynasty.

reward_selection.label: Continue to reward selection
reward_selection.helper: Floor end is complete; open reward selection to compare powerups and rewrites.
reward_selection.explanation: Reward selection is ready. Continue to compare doctrine pieces and genome edits for the next floor.

civil_war_start.label: Start civil-war round
civil_war_start.helper: Successor choice is complete; begin the civil-war duel that decides the surviving branch.
civil_war_start.explanation: Civil war is ready. Start the direct duel and carry the chosen house into the next phase.
